ops.body: Confirmed again 2026-07-12 while releasing cc-context v0.13.0: `uvx capt-hook --hooks plugin/hooks test` on cc-context main shows exactly these 5 warn-message-drift failures (packs.toml attachment, not the ccx pack): nudge_record_evidence ×3 (messages now say 'log_add tool …attach param', expectations still match '--attach'/'cc-notes log add'), nudge_ephemeral_record_reference ×1 (expects '--attach'), nudge_plan_tasks ×1 (expects 'cc-notes task add', message now says 'task_add tool'). Expectations lag the reworded messages — recodify the 5 rows against current text.
